title: sdf.candidate.evaluated v1
description: Emitted for every SDF candidate that scores fitness > 0. Fitness is eikonal-penalised: (1/(1+MSE)) * exp(-0.5*mean_grad_err). Source: /autobench/sdf_kernel.

fitness_variance.description: Variance across the N benchmark instances.

worst_fitness.description: Minimum fitness across instances (worst case instance).

code_length.description: Character count of the evolved sdf() function.

eikonal_score.description: exp(-0.5*mean_grad_err) — 1.0 = perfect eikonal validity, approaches 0 as gradient deviates from 1.

mean_grad_err.description: Mean |∇sdf(p)| - 1| across sampled points. 0 = perfect eikonal field. Used to diagnose raymarcher usability.

mean_mse.description: Raw MSE before eikonal penalty, averaged across instances.

topology_score.description: Gaussian topology membership score: calibrated oracle measuring SDF topological complexity.

sign_change_density.description: Measured sign_change_density on 24^3 grid: fraction of adjacent voxel pairs with opposite SDF signs.
